channel.title: Soniox Blog
channel.description: Speech recognition, voice AI, and product updates from Soniox

item.title: Soniox debuts AI Speech Recognition Platform
item.description: Soniox Inc launched the Soniox AI Speech Recognition Platform, the world’s first self-learning artificial intelligence for automatic speech recognition.

item.title: Soniox releases Knowledge Augmented Audio AI
item.description: Soniox has developed Soniox Knowledge Graph to further enhance the accuracy of Soniox Speech Recognition AI and to provide relevant contextual information about the recognized speech in the audio.

item.title: Soniox speech-to-text benchmarks November 2022
item.description: Speech-to-Text benchmarks comparing Soniox, Google, AWS, Azure, Rev AI, Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI and Speechmatics on 4 different real-world datasets in the English language.

item.title: Soniox and OpenAI speech recognition benchmarks March 2023
item.description: Speech Recognition benchmarks comparing Soniox and OpenAI Whisper on 5 different real-world datasets varying in acoustic conditions, speaking styles, accents and topics in the English language.

item.title: Speech recognition benchmarks for German and Spanish March 2023
item.description: Speech recognition benchmarks comparing Soniox, Google, AWS, Azure, Rev AI, Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI, Speechmatics and NVIDIA on Spanish and German languages.

item.title: Release of Soniox 2.0: Transcribe, store, search, analyze and understand audio on one platform
item.description: Soniox Inc released an audio AI infrastructure that enables developers and businesses to transcribe, store, search and understand audio on one platform These are the core building blocks for any audio/voice/speech application.

item.title: Soniox Speech AI achieves extreme accuracy
item.description: We have released groundbreaking speech recognition AI, achieving extreme levels of accuracy and unlocking new possibilities in human-machine interaction.

item.title: Korean speech recognition AI
item.description: We have introduced game-changing Soniox Korean speech recognition AI, capable of recognizing both Korean and English speech with extreme precision.

item.title: Chinese speech recognition AI
item.description: We are thrilled to announce the release of our groundbreaking Chinese speech recognition AI, achieving unparalleled precision and comprehension of the Chinese language.

item.title: Spanish speech recognition AI
item.description: We are super excited to announce our groundbreaking AI that can simultaneously recognize Spanish and English speech with extreme precision.

item.title: French speech recognition AI
item.description: We are thrilled to introduce a pioneering AI technology capable of recognizing both French and English speech with unparalleled precision.

item.title: Italian speech recognition AI
item.description: We are unveiling a cutting-edge bilingual AI model proficient in discerning both Italian and English with unparalleled accuracy.

item.title: Soniox and Scribe elevate efficiency and accuracy of medical documentation
item.description: Soniox and Scribe are pleased to announce the integration of Soniox's groundbreaking speech recognition AI into Scribe's world-class platform and integration technologies for mobile and desktop.

item.title: Portuguese speech recognition AI
item.description: We are thrilled to announce our new groundbreaking AI that can simultaneously recognize Portuguese and English speech with extreme precision.

item.title: German speech recognition AI
item.description: A small gift from Soniox before the holidays: a groundbreaking AI capable of recognizing German and English speech simultaneously with extreme precision.

item.title: Soniox 7B
item.description: Most powerful 7B large language model. Supports English and code with 8K context. Matches GPT-4 performance on some benchmarks. Built on top of Mistral 7B, enhanced with additional pre-training and fine-tuning for strong problem-solving capabilities.

item.title: One speech AI for the world
item.description: Soniox Speech-to-Text AI — a single, universal model that understands speech in over 60 languages, in real-time, with high accuracy. And more importantly, it works the way people actually speak.

item.title: Introducing Soniox App
item.description: The first mobile app powered by a universal speech AI model that delivers real-time, high-accuracy transcription in over 60 languages.

item.title: Just launched: Real-time speech translation AI for the world
item.description: Today, we’re launching real-time multilingual speech translation in the Soniox API, as well as a brand new mobile app that brings the same technology to your pocket.

item.title: The fastest way to find out which voice AI actually works
item.description: Choosing a speech API isn’t just about specs. It’s about what happens when real-life audio hits the system.

item.title: Soniox v3
item.description: Soniox v3 is our most advanced speech AI yet — designed for accuracy, fluency, and speed at scale.

item.title: Free credits update for Soniox API
item.description: We’re discontinuing free API credits due to widespread abuse and spam signups.

item.title: Introducing the new Soniox App: transcribe, translate, and understand any speech, in any language
item.description: Soniox App brings the world’s most advanced speech AI into your pocket.

item.title: Soniox Sovereign Cloud for effortlessly global, compliant, and performant speech AI
item.description: Sovereign Cloud is now available, letting you run Soniox in regions where your users and data live.

item.title: Introducing the Soniox App for business
item.description: A shared space for your team’s calls, meetings, and interviews.

item.title: Soniox App: Everything you do with voice in your language
item.description: The Soniox App is now one unified voice workspace.

item.title: Soniox v4 Async: Human-parity speech recognition across 60+ languages
item.description: We’re launching Soniox v4 Async, a major leap forward in speech recognition.

item.title: Soniox v4 Real-Time: The new standard for real-time speech AI
item.description: A speech recognition model purpose-built for low-latency voice interactions.

item.title: The end of English-first voice AI, now on desktop
item.description: Work, think, and use your voice in your own language.

item.title: Soniox named best-in-class STT for voice agents
item.description: In a comprehensive study by Daily (Pipecat), Soniox was recognized as a top-tier provider for real-time voice agents.

item.title: New Soniox SDKs
item.description: Introducing the new Soniox SDKs for Python, Node, Web, React, and React Native.

item.title: Introducing Soniox Text-to-Speech
item.description: Generate high-fidelity speech in 60+ languages, built for names, alphanumerics, language switching, and ultra-low-latency streaming.

item.title: How to build a multilingual voice bot with Pipecat and Soniox
item.description: Soniox Text-to-Speech is now fully available in Pipecat. Plug it in and build your multilingual voice bot with Soniox API.
